testsuite.name: Let's create a new user and sign-in with that user

testcase.name: create an user

error.message: WebDriver was unable to create a new instance of type class org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver WebDriver reported the following message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-6FQMBN1', ip: '192.168.0.148' See below for more details.

testcase.error: WebDriver was unable to create a new instance of type class org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver WebDriver reported the following message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-6FQMBN1', ip: '192.168.0.148' See below for more details.
testcase.system-err: WebDriver was unable to create a new instance of type class org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver WebDriver reported the following message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-6FQMBN1', ip: '192.168.0.148' See below for more details. com.Orange.StepDefinitions.BaseClass.loadBrowser(BaseClass.java:21) com.Orange.StepDefinitions.CommonSteps.launch_the_browser(CommonSteps.java:44)
